title: Claude Managed Agents Will Make Millionaires (do this now)
summary: Claude-managed agents represent an architectural shift for AI automation and agency services. The video argues that cognitive architecture, persistent memory, and large token context windows enable continuous learning capabilities suitable for productized AI systems.
